title: navarretia mitracarpa subsp. jaredii
intro: Navarretia mitracarpa subsp. jaredii, also known as Jared's navarretia, is a rare and endangered plant species that belongs to the phlox family. It is used in herbal medicine for its potential anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which may be beneficial in treating wounds, infections, and other health issues. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and promoting wound healing, although more research is needed to confirm these claims. Traditionally, Jared's navarretia is prepared as a tincture or infusion for medicinal use, although its preparation and usage should be done under the guidance of a qualified healthcare professional.
